Prior scan assessment framing of "bankruptcy escape denied" was incorrect — settlement approved Feb 14. Settlement-without-admission methodology question: reparative step vs. accountability avoidance via legal procedure.

countries/israel.summary: OCHA Sit. Update (May 28-June 3): 59% of planned aid movements denied despite nominal authorization via Jordan/Allenby crossing. Family of 9 killed in As Saftawi, North Gaza (May 28). At least 23 Palestinians killed in Al Bureij refugee camp (May 29). HRW (May 19): Israel curbing aid and killing civilians during ceasefire. Cumulative toll 72,619+ confirmed dead through early May. Authorized-resumption-with-systematic-denial pattern is a new conduct sub-category. Post-ceasefire civilian-targeting confirmed as distinct documented pattern.

countries/hungary.summary: Sulyok May 31 resignation deadline expired. Sulyok confirmed refusal (May 18: "June 1 will come"). Magyar has threatened constitutional amendment to remove him using 2/3 parliamentary majority. 16th Amendment introduced May 20 including 8-year PM term limit. Magyar stated removal legal framework would begin after deadline. EU Commissioner McGrath confirmed Hungary on "very clear and steadfast" rule-of-law path (May 28). Constitutional confrontation outcome now determinative for next assessment cycle.

countries/iran.summary: Internet partially restored May 25 after 88-day shutdown (longest national internet shutdown on record). Amnesty confirmed 39 political executions and 6,000+ arbitrary arrests since Feb 28 US-Israel attack including journalists, lawyers, and HRDs. Amnesty 2025 annual report: Iran executed at least 2,159 people in 2025 (80% of all documented global executions). OHCHR: imprisoned protesters face expedited executions. Scale-floor methodology ruling required for near-floor composite of 2.5.

countries/russia.summary: Civic Death Law passed Duma May 26 (second and third readings): asset seizure, passport denial, digital service ban for emigrated critics. HRW characterized as extraterritorial civil-rights deprivation via law. Affects estimated 1M+ emigrated Russians. Mediazona/Meduza: 352,000 Russian military deaths over four years in Ukraine war (new estimate). UN Security Council briefing on human cost of Ukraine war (May 26). New methodology sub-anchor candidate: EXTRATERRITORIAL-CIVIL-DEATH-LAW.
